when_to_use: Korean-English neural MT for Naver ecosystem apps
Language detection API for multi-lingual content routing
Japanese and Chinese translation for APAC expansion
Chat translation integration for Korean social apps
Real-time translation API for Korean developer tools

pros: Low latency inside Korean and APAC regions
cons: Strict daily request quotas on free tier
Fewer languages than Google or DeepL
review.verdict: Strong pick for apps targeting Korean users; outside CJK-plus-English the language count becomes a real limit.
review.best_for: Consumer apps localizing into Korean and nearby Asian languages
review.not_for: Products needing broad European or Middle Eastern coverage
